generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PhysicalChassis : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis for steering and speed control via Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium chassis"
]

instance AutonomyPlatform : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Upper-level autonomy platform hosted on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for real-time processing"
]

instance MotorActuation : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control in the physical twin"
]

instance SteeringActuation : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Steering servo for steering adjustments in the physical twin"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance LiDARHokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR generating raw point clouds for object detection and tracking via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance DepthCameraIntelD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera providing 3D spatial data for environment perception and projected driving path visualization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraDepthData
]

instance OnboardSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed and steering angle data streams collected via ROS2 topics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction data streams
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARHokuyoUST10LX
]

instance CameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCameraIntelD435i
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OnboardSensors
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance LiDARCameraFusionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering + Kalman filtering for object tracking from point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant (Performance Class I) speed computation using distance-based following logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position and velocity data of detected objects from LiDAR/camera fusion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDataSQL : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Speed and steering angle data of the ego vehicle for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D visualization of projected driving path derived from LiDAR/camera fusion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, CameraDepthData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo 3DVisualizationTools
]

instance TimeseriesReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Generated reports containing timeseries data of vehicle/object tracks for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData, EgoVehicleStateDataSQL
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for inter-component communication and inter-entity networking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, DataMonitoringService, DataTranslationFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for cloud-based DT processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX for on-board processing in physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ActuationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of DT components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiDARCameraFusionModel
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External SQL database for storing object tracks, ego vehicle state, and reports"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation Frontend for serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance 3DVisualizationTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D rendering tools for real-time ego vehicle/object visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time collection of object tracks (position/velocity) and ego vehicle state (speed/steering angle)"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackData, EgoVehicleStateDataSQL
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, detected object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization Tools (UI)"
    DTDFVocab:provides ProjectedDrivingPathData
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic (lead-vehicle detection, speed computation) from vehicle ECUs to cloud-based Digital Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlModel
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, trigger emergency braking, and generate reports"
]

instance TroubleshootingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Developer tool for data collection and monitoring to debug system performance during development"
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance 3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle state, detected objects, and projected driving path"
]

instance PerformanceDebuggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ACC system performance (speed deviations, object tracking errors) for tuning"
]

instance RemoteCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote execution of ACC control commands (enable/disable, speed setting, emergency braking)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of timeseries reports containing vehicle/object track data for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic emergency braking triggered by DT based on object detection and ACC logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment
instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalChassis, AutonomyPlatform, MotorActuation, SteeringActuation,
    LiDARHokuyoUST10LX, DepthCameraIntelD435i, OnboardSensors
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ROS2Middleware, SQLDatabase, DataTranslationFE
]

instance UserInterfaceEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains 3DVisualizationInsight, DataMonitoringService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends control commands to the physical twin via:
  - **ROS2 network**: Actuation commands (e.g., motor voltage for speed control, steering servo adjustments) are generated by the **Actuation FE** and transmitted back to the vehicle’s Jetson Orin Nano.
  - **Wi-Fi network**: Remote management commands (e.g., ACC enable/disable, desired speed adjustment, emergency braking) are routed from the DT’s **Control Panel UI FE** to the vehicle’s onboard system.
  - **Latency-critical paths**: All virtual-to-physical interactions adhere to ≤100 ms latency requirements for real-time ACC operation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time, event-driven time scale**:
  - **Data collection rate**: LiDAR point clouds processed at ~10–20 Hz (DBSCAN/Kalman filtering), ego vehicle state updated every perception cycle (~10–50 Hz).
  - **Latency constraints**: End-to-end latency between vehicle and DT Entity ≤100 ms (3GPP V2V specification).
  - **Synchronization**: Clock synchronization accuracy of ≤100 ms (critical for distributed systems and event ordering)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized into **three primary entities** (ISO 23247 RA adapted for automotive):
  1. **Physical Twin Entity**:
     - Hosts on-board resources (sensors, actuators, Jetson Orin Nano).
     - Implements:
       - **Data Pre-Processing FE**: LiDAR point cloud processing.
       - **Actuation FE**: Motor/servo control commands.
       - **Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE**: DBSCAN/Kalman filtering.
  2. **Digital Twin Entity**:
     - Cloud-based component handling:
       - **Data Collection FE**: Object/vehicle state collection.
       - **Reporting FE**: Timeseries report generation.
       - **Controlling FE**: ACC logic (lead-vehicle detection, speed computation).
  3. **User Entity**:
     - Single UI instance with:
       - **3D Visualization FE**: Real-time rendering of ego vehicle/objects.
       - **Control Panel FE**: Remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, set speed, emergency braking).
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used for cyber-physical experimentation (simulator integration with 3D CAD/Simulink for ACC validation).
  - **Manufacturing Phase**: Not directly applicable (physical twin is a retrofitted prototype).
  - **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance (e.g., emergency braking, ACC tuning) during vehicle operation.
  The DT covers the **operated-as** phase of the physical twin, focusing on real-time performance validation and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**:
    - **ACC Control**: ISO 15622-compliant (Performance Class I) for safety-critical following logic.
    - **Latency**: End-to-end latency ≤100 ms (3GPP V2V specification).
    - **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy for distributed systems.
  - **Validation**:
    - **Real-time Performance**: Tested on 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle with LiDAR/camera fusion.
    - **Data Accuracy**: Object tracks derived from DBSCAN/Kalman filtering (ground truth via manual inspection).
    - **Uncertainty Handling**: No explicit uncertainty quantification mentioned; reliance on sensor fusion algorithms (e.g., Kalman filter assumptions)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections between PT and DT:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **On-board**: ROS2 (ROS 2.0) for intra-vehicle communication.
    - **Inter-entity**: Wi-Fi (UDP-based) for cloud-to-vehicle data transfer.
  - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP V2V spec).
  - **Data Serialization**: Custom **Data Translation FE** ensures message type alignment and unit conversions (e.g., LiDAR coordinates to ROS2 topics)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **cloud-based system** with on-board components:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosted on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (on-vehicle processing).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Cloud-based (external to vehicle), running on NVIDIA Jetson NX (for real-time processing).
  - **User Entity**: Single UI instance accessible via web interface (3D visualization + control panel).
  - **Data Storage**: External SQL database (not on-vehicle) for historical data (object tracks, vehicle state)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Systems**: Not explicitly detailed in documents; assumed to use ROS2-based middleware for inter-DT communication (if applicable).
  - **Vehicle Data Systems**: Ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) is shared with other ADAS systems (e.g., collision avoidance) via ROS2 topics."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture adapted for automotive DTs (Physical Twin Entity introduced).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) control logic (Performance Class I).
  - **3GPP 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication latency requirements (≤100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for middleware communication.
  - **OPC UA**: Mentioned as a potential implementation for Data Translation FE (not used in this case study)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety-Critical Paths**:
    - **Latency**: ≤100 ms end-to-end for ACC actuation (3GPP V2V spec).
    - **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy for distributed systems.
    - **Hardware Isolation**: On-board processing (Jetson Orin Nano) separated from cloud-based DT Entity.
  - **Remote Operations**:
    - Emergency braking commands are validated before execution (no direct human-in-the-loop for critical actions).
    - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Operators can disable ACC or override commands remotely (but not autonomously trigger accidents).
  - **Data Security**: No explicit mention of encryption/access controls; assumed to follow automotive cybersecurity best practices (e.g., TLS for Wi-Fi communication)."
]
